Class ProductUsage

java.lang.Object
ProductUsage
public class ProductUsage extends Object
Represents product usage data for inventory tracking. Stores the item ID, name, and amount used.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Default constructor.

    • ProductUsage

      public ProductUsage()

    • ProductUsage

      public ProductUsage(int stockItemId, String itemName, double amountUsed)
      Creates a ProductUsage object with the given values.
      Parameters:
      stockItemId - the ID of the stock item
      itemName - the name of the item
      amountUsed - the amount of the item used
